sqlMap.insert: Insert into c_yzd_check_t (companyid,checkdate,resultsummary,attachments,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) values ($companyid$,'$checkdate$','$resultsummary$','$attachments$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(id) from c_yzd_check_t where validflag > 0
checkdate = '$checkdate$'
companyid = $companyid$

select a.*,group_concat(sf.id order by sf.id separator ',') as fileids,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id SEPARATOR ',') as filenames FROM (select * from c_yzd_check_t where validflag > 0
checkdate = '$checkdate$'
companyid = $companyid$
) a left join sys_file_t sf on find_in_set(sf.id,a.attachments) group by a.id
select a.*,b.companyname from c_yzd_check_t a left join c_company_t b on a.companyid = b.id where a.validflag > 0 and a.id = $id$
sqlMap.update: update c_yzd_check_t set checkdate='$checkdate$', resultsummary='$resultsummary$',attachments='$attachments$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$' where id = $id$
UPDATE C_YZD_CHECK_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE ID = $id$
